vision_analysis.primary_subject: water heater nearing end of life

input.transcript: Water heater is 16 years old, showing corrosion at the base. Replacement is going to run somewhere between fifteen hundred and three thousand dollars depending on what they go with.

expected.rationale: Inspector volunteered cost estimates but the AI must strip them. Output stays factual about condition, no numbers.

vision_analysis.primary_subject: loose cover plate on live electrical outlet

input.transcript: Outlet cover is missing in the garage, you can see the wires. This is dangerous, anyone could touch it.

expected.rationale: Inspector used 'dangerous' in transcript but AI must use 'safety concern' or 'safety hazard' instead per spec.

source: Spec §8 — inspector says 'fine' overrides vision AI

vision_analysis.primary_subject: old electrical panel labeled Federal Pacific

visible_defects.defect: Federal Pacific Stab-Lok panel, known failure mode

input.transcript: Federal Pacific panel here — I know they have the reputation but this one was retrofitted with current Eaton breakers in 2019, has the documented retrofit kit installed. Tested fine on all circuits. Documenting it but it's not a defect.

expected.rationale: Vision AI flagged it safety_hazard. Inspector says it's been retrofitted and tested. Trust inspector. Output as info documenting the panel + retrofit.
